message.content:
@startuml
title PCWS Sequences

actor Customer
participant PCWS
database PostgreSQL
participant Disk
participant transfer_logs.sh
participant "Account Service"
participant "Datalog Service"

Customer -> PCWS : request image
PCWS -> "Account Service" : check account permission
PCWS -> PCWS : generate image
PCWS -> Disk : write data log
PCWS -> Customer : image

note over Disk, transfer_logs.sh : some time later

loop [for each log]
  transfer_logs.sh -> Disk : read data log
  transfer_logs.sh -> "Datalog Service" : send data log
  "Datalog Service" -> transfer_logs.sh
end

@enduml
